title: DSML Kazakhstan
subtitle: DSMLKZ Community - Сообщество энтузиастов AI и Машинного обучения в Казахстане
communityDescription: Connect with over 10,000 AI and ML professionals across Kazakhstan through our diverse ecosystem of channels, each designed to serve different aspects of your professional journey.
discussionHubDescription: Main community chat for discussions, networking, and knowledge sharing among AI/ML professionals.
newsFeedDescription: Stay updated with the latest AI/ML news, research breakthroughs, and community announcements.
dataJobsDescription: Exclusive job opportunities in data science, machine learning, and AI across Kazakhstan and beyond.
itJobsDescription: Broader IT job opportunities including software development, DevOps, and technical roles.
youtubeChannelDescription: Educational content, tutorials, and recordings of our community events and workshops.
linkedinPageDescription: Professional networking, industry insights, and career development resources.
collaborationSubtitle: We partner with leading companies, educational institutions, and organizations to create value for our community.

mediaSupport.title: Media Support
mediaSupport.details: We provide comprehensive media coverage for AI/ML events, including live streaming, content creation, and promotional support to maximize reach and impact.

hiring.title: Talent Acquisition
hiring.details: Connect with our network of 10,000+ AI/ML professionals. We help companies find the right talent through targeted job postings and recruitment support.

corporateTraining.title: Corporate Training
corporateTraining.details: Tailored training programs for your team, covering everything from AI fundamentals to advanced machine learning techniques, delivered by industry experts.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.details: Strategic consulting for AI/ML initiatives, from project planning and architecture design to implementation guidance and best practices.

communityFirstDesc: We prioritize the needs and growth of our community members above all else.
continuousLearningDesc: We foster an environment of constant learning and knowledge sharing.
careerGrowthDesc: We support our members' professional development and career advancement.
